author: pan4ratte
description: Allows you to automatically color files in file explorer based on the tags they contain. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: pan4ratte
manifest.description: Allows you to automatically color files in file explorer based on the tags they contain.
manifest.name: Tags Color Files

name: Tags Color Files

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's new

> Notice: your existing rules almost certainly will stop working after the update. Backup is highly recommended.

This release introduces one major change and multiple quality-of-life enhancements.

* New feature: Folder rules. Apply coloring only to the files inside specified folder. Thanks to @filipjaruska for idea.
* UX enhancement: New filter for positive/negative tag matching.
* UI enhancement: New design and layout for rules of both types.

## Performance optimizations and fixes

Thanks to @filipjaruska for his contributions in PR #4 

* Bug fix: non-text files are not skipped during scanning. 
* Performance: debounced DOM updates.
* Optimization: single-pass tag/folder normalization.

## Other

* READMEs were updated.
* Locales were update

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-tags-color-files/compare/1.5.0...2.0.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* New feature: negative tag matching by @filipjaruska — now you can choose whether the rule should check if the tag present or absent in the notes. See https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-tags-color-files/pull/3
* Fixed: settings export bug.
* Updated: features description in READMEs.

## Other

* Added: artifact attestation.
* Updated: .gitignore

## New Contributors
* @filipjaruska made their first contribution in https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-tags-color-files/pull/3

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-tags-color-files/compare/1.4.2...1.5.0

releases.author: pan4ratte
releases.description:
New features:

* Added new coloring methods "Dots before text + text" and "Dots after text + text" that combine already existing methods.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-tags-color-files/compare/1.3.2...1.4.0

releases.author: pan4ratte
releases.description:
New features:

* Complete mobile optimization.
* New error message when user inputs an invalid tag name while creating a new rule
* UI/UX design enhancements.

Bugs and other fixes:

* READMEs updates and corrections.
* Various fixes for Obsidian community plugins review process.
* Locales updates.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-tags-color-files/compare/1.2.0...1.3.0

releases.author: pan4ratte
releases.description:
New features:

* Added error message when conflicting rules are created.
* From now, plugin ignores # symbol and input casing when creating a new coloring rule.
* Coloring rules drag and drop function is completely rewritten and now looks much fancier.

Bug fixes and other improvements:

* Fixed deletion of tags from plugin database when dragging and dropping them in the plugin settings.
* Updated locales.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-tags-color-files/compare/1.0.2...1.2.0
